title: Sustantivos contables y no contables
communication_goal: Usar sustantivos contables y no contables en situaciones cotidianas.
cefr_objectives: Can use basic language related to sustantivos contables y no contables.
explanation_es: Este tema desarrolla sustantivos contables y no contables mediante práctica guiada y comunicación contextual.

lessons.title: Can we count it?
lessons.objective: Distinguir sustantivos contables y no contables en contextos cotidianos.

activities.prompt: Which noun is countable?
activities.feedback_correct: Apple puede contarse: one apple, two apples.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el sustantivo que puede tener número plural.

activities.prompt: I need some ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Water es normalmente no contable.
activities.feedback_incorrect: En esta frase usamos el sustantivo sin plural.

activities.prompt: There are three ___ on the table.
activities.feedback_correct: Books es plural contable.
activities.feedback_incorrect: There are necesita un sustantivo plural contable aquí.

activities.feedback_correct: Separaste objetos contables de sustancias o conceptos no contables.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Pregunta si puedes decir one, two, three directamente delante del sustantivo.

activities.prompt: I bought two bread.
activities.correct_answer: I bought two loaves of bread.
activities.feedback_correct: Bread es no contable; usamos una unidad como loaves.
activities.feedback_incorrect: No decimos two bread; añade una unidad contable.

activities.prompt: For breakfast, I have two eggs, some toast, and coffee.
activities.question: Which item is countable?
activities.feedback_correct: Eggs puede contarse y aparece en plural.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha el sustantivo que tiene el número two.

activities.prompt: One apple, two apples. Some water, some rice. Three eggs and some milk.
evaluation_criteria: no unnecessary plural on uncountable nouns
activities.feedback_correct: Distingues el plural de los sustantivos contables.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Añade /s/ o /z/ a los plurales, pero no a water, rice o milk.

activities.prompt: At the market, Ana buys four oranges, two tomatoes, some cheese, some bread, and a bottle of oil.
activities.question: How many tomatoes does Ana buy?
activities.feedback_correct: Tomatoes es contable y aparece con el número two.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el número que acompaña a tomatoes.

activities.prompt: Write a shopping list with five countable nouns and five uncountable nouns. Add numbers to the countable items.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu lista muestra claramente las dos categorías.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa números y plurales con countable; usa some o una unidad con uncountable.

activities.prompt: You are in a grocery store. Tell the AI what countable and uncountable foods you need and ask about quantities.
success_criteria: uses at least four countable nouns
uses at least four uncountable nouns
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes hablar de productos y cantidades con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te ayuda a elegir plural, some o una unidad para cada producto.

lessons.title: Quantities and containers
lessons.objective: Expresar cantidades de sustantivos contables y no contables usando números, some y unidades comunes.

activities.prompt: I need ___ eggs.
activities.feedback_correct: Eggs es contable y puede ir con un número.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa una cantidad que combine naturalmente con el plural eggs.

activities.prompt: a ___ of water
activities.feedback_correct: Bottle es una unidad contable para water.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Para medir water usamos un recipiente como bottle.

activities.prompt: There is ___ cheese in the fridge.
activities.feedback_correct: Some funciona bien con cheese en una frase afirmativa.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cheese es no contable en este contexto.

activities.instruction: Une el alimento con una unidad natural.
activities.feedback_correct: Usas unidades para expresar cantidades no contables.
activities.feedback_incorrect: El sustantivo no contable necesita una unidad o recipiente.

activities.prompt: I want two coffees, please. (meaning: two cups)
activities.correct_answer: I want two cups of coffee, please.
activities.feedback_correct: Cup permite contar la cantidad de coffee.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Añade la unidad cup antes de coffee.

activities.prompt: Please buy six bananas, a bag of rice, two bottles of water, and some cheese.
activities.question: How many bottles of water are needed?
activities.feedback_correct: Two bottles of water es la cantidad indicada.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha el número antes de bottles of water.

activities.prompt: A bottle of water. Two bags of rice. Three pieces of cheese. Four apples.
activities.feedback_correct: Las cantidades y unidades se entienden claramente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica las unidades como grupos: a-bottle-of-water, two-bags-of-rice.

activities.prompt: The order includes one loaf of bread, two cartons of milk, five apples, and three cups of coffee.
activities.question: How many apples are in the order?
activities.feedback_correct: Apples es contable y la cantidad es five.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el número que acompaña a apples.

activities.prompt: Write a café order with three countable items and three non-countable items using suitable quantities or containers.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu pedido expresa cantidades de forma natural.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa si necesitas a/an, un número, some o una unidad como cup o bottle.

activities.instruction: Haz un pedido en una cafetería.
activities.prompt: Order breakfast from the AI. Ask for quantities and respond when the server checks each item.
activities.feedback_correct: Pides alimentos y cantidades de forma comprensible.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te ofrece alternativas y corrige solo las cantidades necesarias.

lessons.title: Asking about quantities
lessons.objective: Preguntar y responder sobre cantidades de objetos, alimentos y sustancias en situaciones diarias.

activities.prompt: ___ apples do we need?
activities.feedback_correct: How many se usa con sustantivos contables plurales.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Apples puede contarse: usa How many.

activities.prompt: ___ milk is in the fridge?
activities.feedback_correct: How much se usa con milk, que es no contable.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Milk no se cuenta directamente con números.

activities.prompt: Are there ___ bananas?
activities.feedback_correct: Any funciona en preguntas con sustantivos contables plurales.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Bananas es plural contable; elige el cuantificador adecuado.

activities.prompt: How much sugar do you want? ___, please.
activities.feedback_correct: A little se usa con sugar, un sustantivo no contable.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Sugar no es contable directamente; usa A little.

activities.prompt: How many water do you drink?
activities.correct_answer: How much water do you drink?
activities.feedback_correct: Water es no contable y necesita How much.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cambia many por much porque water no es contable directamente.

activities.prompt: A: How many sandwiches do we have? B: We have four. A: How much juice is left? B: Only a little.
activities.question: How many sandwiches are there?
activities.feedback_correct: Four responde a una pregunta con How many.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la respuesta de la primera pregunta.

activities.prompt: How many apples? How much water? A few apples. A little water.
evaluation_criteria: clear difference between many and much
activities.feedback_correct: Las preguntas de cantidad se entienden claramente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Marca la diferencia entre many para contables y much para no contables.

activities.prompt: The kitchen has many plates, a few cups, much coffee, and a little tea. There is no juice.
activities.question: How much tea is there?
activities.feedback_correct: Tea es no contable y la cantidad es a little.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la cantidad relacionada con tea.

activities.prompt: Write four quantity questions and answer them about your kitchen or home. Use How many, How much, a few, and a little.
activities.feedback_correct: Preguntas y respuestas expresan cantidades con precisión básica.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Decide primero si el sustantivo se puede contar directamente.

activities.prompt: You and the AI are preparing a party. Ask how many countable items and how much food or drink you have. Decide what to buy.
success_criteria: asks at least six quantity questions
uses many, much, a few, and a little
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes investigar cantidades y tomar decisiones en inglés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te da pistas visuales y reformula la pregunta si eliges el cuantificador incorrecto.

lessons.title: Plan a meal
lessons.objective: Usar sustantivos contables y no contables, cantidades y unidades para planificar una comida.

activities.prompt: We need ___ tomatoes and some cheese.
activities.feedback_correct: Tomatoes es contable plural y acepta un número.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una cantidad que pueda ir directamente con tomatoes.

activities.prompt: There isn't ___ bread left.
activities.feedback_correct: Much se usa con bread en una negación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Bread es no contable en este contexto.

activities.prompt: Can I have ___ water, please?
activities.feedback_correct: Glass es una unidad contable para water.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa un recipiente antes de water.

activities.prompt: how much / do / need / rice / we
activities.correct_answer: How much rice do we need?
activities.feedback_correct: How much + sustantivo no contable + do we need.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca How much al principio y rice antes de do we need.

activities.prompt: I need three milks and a bread.
activities.correct_answer: I need three cartons of milk and a loaf of bread.
activities.feedback_correct: Usaste unidades para contar milk y bread.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Añade una unidad como cartons o loaf para los sustantivos no contables.

activities.prompt: For the picnic, bring six sandwiches, two bottles of water, a little fruit, and a bag of chips.
activities.question: What should you bring two bottles of?
activities.feedback_correct: Two bottles of water es la expresión correcta.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la palabra después de bottles of.

activities.prompt: How many sandwiches do we need? We need six sandwiches and two bottles of water.
activities.feedback_correct: El pedido contiene cantidades claras y naturales.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica primero la pregunta y después la respuesta en un solo ritmo.

activities.prompt: For dinner, the family has four chicken breasts, some rice, a little salad, two bottles of juice, and many vegetables.
activities.question: Which items are measured with bottles?
activities.feedback_correct: Juice aparece como two bottles of juice.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la palabra que aparece después de bottles of.

activities.prompt: Write a complete shopping list for four people. Include eight items, quantities, and at least three units for uncountable nouns.
activities.feedback_correct: La lista es útil y diferencia las dos clases de sustantivos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa plural, much/many y unidades como bottle, bag, loaf o carton.

activities.instruction: Organiza una comida con la IA.
activities.prompt: Plan a meal for four guests. Ask the AI what is available, calculate what is missing, and place the final order.
success_criteria: uses countable and uncountable nouns accurately
asks how many and how much
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes planear una compra completa usando cantidades reales.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te ayuda con pistas y vuelve a practicar las estructuras que causan dificultad.
